sentences.arabic: سَمِعَ رَشِيدٌ صَوْتَ غِنَاءٍ جَمِيلٍ مِنَ الشَّارِعِ.
sentences.translation: Rashid je čuo lijep pjev s ulice.
sentences.translationEn: Rashid heard a beautiful singing voice from the street.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ النَّافِذَةَ وَنَظَرَ لَكِنَّهُ لَمْ يَرَ أَحَدًا.
sentences.translation: Otvorio je prozor i pogledao ali nije vidio nikoga.
sentences.translationEn: He opened the window and looked but saw no one.

sentences.translation: Sišao je na ulicu i tražio.
sentences.translationEn: He went down to the street and looked.

sentences.arabic: رَأَى طِفْلَةً صَغِيرَةً تَجْلِسُ خَلْفَ الشَّجَرَةِ وَتَغَنِّي.
sentences.translation: Vidio je malo djevojčice koja sjedi iza drveta i pjeva.
sentences.translationEn: He saw a little girl sitting behind the tree and singing.

sentences.arabic: صَفَّقَ رَشِيدٌ لَهَا فَابْتَسَمَتْ وَاسْتَمَرَّتْ فِي الْغِنَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Rashid joj je zapljeskao a ona se nasmiješila i nastavila pjevati.
sentences.translationEn: Rashid clapped for her and she smiled and kept on singing.
